sections.title: If the player wears either an amulet of ghostspeak or the Morytania legs 2+

lines.speaker: Ghost villager
lines.text: We do not talk to the warm-bloods.

lines.speaker: Ghost villager
lines.text: Why did we have to listen to that maniacal priest?

lines.speaker: Ghost villager
lines.text: This cold wind blows right through you, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: Ghost villager
lines.text: Worship the Ectofuntus all you want, but don't bother us, human.

sections.title: If the player does not wear either an amulet of ghostspeak or the Morytania legs 2+
